search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk/guidance/cg153 psoriasis flare assessment severity impact systemic upset joints
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic topical, systemic, biologic, phototherapy, or referral recommendation
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: No complete validated score inputs are present.
All treatment and referral decisions remain clinician-entered.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults or children with clinician-established or suspected psoriasis reporting worsening; pregnancy, systemic illness, joint symptoms, pediatric, and medicine contexts need specific assessment.
UAE_applicability: Assessment fields are transferable, but UAE medicines, laboratory monitoring, phototherapy, biologics, pregnancy, emergency, and referral pathways remain local.
recency_verification: Current NICE CG153, last updated in 2017, was reviewed on 2026-07-14; material recency limits remain.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact psoriasis assessment section supports documenting an established or suspected flare context, onset or change, severity and life impact, symptoms, concerns, clinician skin and nail inspection, distribution, general appearance and available records without inferring severity, flare cause, or treatment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting psoriasis type, duration, extent, distribution, nails, high-impact sites, symptoms, systemic upset, daily-life impact, and wellbeing without inferring an individual diagnosis or treatment.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Joint-symptom and clinician-led referral qualifiers were reviewed, but no arthritis diagnosis or referral is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports asking about joint symptoms and recording clinician-led specialist assessment or referral only when completed or arranged.

unresolved_source_gaps: Psoriasis type, exact sites and extent, high-impact sites, nail and joint findings, systemic features, treatment and adherence, medicine, diagnosis, severity score, investigations, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
